file_insights.changes: Added Zellij web client port (8082) availability check

patterns_discovered.context: Health check probe for optional service availability
Aligns with existing diagnostic check outputs in the doctor command

patterns_discovered.implementation: Reports 'info' level (not error) when port unavailable
patterns_discovered.context: Web client is optional; absence should not fail health check

gotchas_discovered.note: Safe here since literal string is always valid, but violates panic-free best practices
May be too aggressive on slow systems or too lenient; not configurable
Transient failures could produce false negatives; acceptable for diagnostic tool

approach_outcome.implementation_strategy: Minimal, non-blocking port availability check using standard library

recommendations.action: Extract port number and timeout to named constants
recommendations.rationale: Improves maintainability if values change or are referenced elsewhere

recommendations.action: Consider replacing .unwrap() with parse().expect("valid socket address")
recommendations.rationale: Improves code clarity and panic messages if assumptions change

recommendations.action: Document expected behavior when web client is disabled
recommendations.rationale: Users should understand that 'info' level means web client is optional, not broken

recommendations.action: Consider IPv6 [::1]:8082 fallback or explicit documentation of IPv4-only support
